title: Started Local Studio App Migration
summary: Started the migration from Jekyll-hosted Studio pages to a local Python-hosted vanilla Studio app by excluding Studio-only public output, adding the local app server, mounting the Studio home, Tag Groups, and Docs Viewer shells, and exposing runtime config plus Docs generated-read API adapters.
effect: This establishes the local app boundary while preserving existing browser modules, records the first behavior-changing commit point, and makes future slices responsible for structured close-out and generated-payload status.
verification: Python compile checks passed for local Studio server modules and focused tests
Browser sanity check on port 8765 confirmed Docs Viewer layout and Tag Groups ready state
Generated docs/search payloads were not rebuilt; source docs and docs-log indexes changed only
